title: Soul Candles
description: Adds Soul Candles and Soul Jack o'Lanterns.
body:
Soul Candles adds (if that isn't obvious enough) **soul candles**! _(and also Soul Jack o'Lanterns)_

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3365df0b5f0208a4a6137c60353f66349cec1bb2.gif)

This new type of candles has the same behavior as the vanilla candles, but it burns with **soul fire which light is dimmer**.

[![Soul Candles requires Fabric API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Soul Candles is also available on CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soul-candles)

## Crafting
![Soul Candle crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ad9a22ccb4d15abc285530a9d8f5ad9dbeb1f74.png)

The Soul Candle is crafted in a similar way to the normal candle but with the addition of Soul Sand or Soul Soil at the bottom.

![Dyed Soul Candle crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d23ea502eccd5922b842b49aa73dc60da1bdaad.gif)

Soul Candles can also be dyed by combining a Soul Candle and the corresponding dye.

If you forget the crafting, it is available in the recipe book or in mods such as JEI, EMI, REI, etc. 

## In-game images
![Render of soul candles in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc2fcedd54cf502917f61d85843a78421e21b809.png)
![Soul Candles in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7201b098e507b287c672f70529771ff145557e4.png)
